name: claude-code-hwp-mcp
description: MCP server for HWP (한글) document automation via pyhwpx COM API. 94 tools for document editing, analysis, table formatting, and AI-powered filling.

scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=commonjs -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('python -c \"import pyhwpx\"',{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){console.log('\n[claude-code-hwp-mcp] pyhwpx 미설치. 실행하세요: pip install pyhwpx pywin32\n')}"
